apps.name: Rummy Guru
apps.tagline: Rummy Guru APK — the leading Android card game app for skill-based Rummy players across all of India.
apps.description: Rummy Guru is a popular Android card game app that lets you play classic Rummy variants against real opponents. Sharpen your skills, track your stats, and enjoy smooth gameplay on any Android device.

seo.metaTitle: Rummy Guru APK — Download & Play Skill-Based Rummy on Android
seo.metaDescription: Rummy Guru APK: play classic 13-card Rummy on Android. Free download, no ads, smooth gameplay. 18+ | Some states may restrict access.

faq.question: What is Rummy Guru?
faq.answer: Rummy Guru is an Android card game app focused on 13-card skill-based Rummy. It offers multiple table formats and supports offline practice mode.

faq.question: Is Rummy Guru free to download?
faq.answer: Yes, the Rummy Guru APK is free to download and install on any Android device running Android 6.0 or higher.

faq.question: Is Rummy a skill-based game?
faq.answer: Yes. Indian courts have consistently held that Rummy is a game of skill. Players must use memory, strategy, and probability assessment to succeed.

faq.question: What is the minimum Android version required?
faq.answer: Rummy Guru requires Android 6.0 or above and approximately 38 MB of free storage.

apps.name: Teen Patti Guru
apps.tagline: Teen Patti Guru APK — play the classic Indian 3-card skill game with friends on any Android device today.
apps.description: Teen Patti Guru brings the classic Indian 3-card game to Android with smooth graphics, multiple variants, and an active player community. Practice offline or go head-to-head in live tables.

seo.metaTitle: Teen Patti Guru APK — Download 3-Card Skill Game for Android
seo.metaDescription: Teen Patti Guru APK: classic 3-card game for Android. Free download, offline & live modes. 18+ | Some states may restrict access.

faq.question: What is Teen Patti Guru?
faq.answer: Teen Patti Guru is an Android card game app for the classic Indian 3-card game. It includes multiple play variants and both solo and live table modes.

faq.question: Is Teen Patti Guru free?
faq.answer: Yes, the Teen Patti Guru APK is completely free to download and install.

faq.question: Can I play Teen Patti Guru offline?
faq.answer: Yes, Teen Patti Guru includes an offline practice mode so you can sharpen your skills without an internet connection.

faq.question: What Android version does Teen Patti Guru need?
faq.answer: Android 6.0 or higher, with at least 42 MB free storage space.
